TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Umitan_go, title = Umitan_go, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Umitan_go} }

S.FORM: Umitan go mki sku Taitung. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 892.99 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 817.5 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 74.18 km²), 4,278 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 1,090 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 4,032 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 94%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Bunun ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Umitan go ays psgayun 6 ru 15 alang. 15 alang hani ga, Kanahcian , Kanaluk , Bacingul , Kamcing , Kusunuki , Haitutuan , Takinusta , Sulai-iaz , Samuluh , Tuapuu , Takimi , Likau-uan , Bulbul , Vahu , Litu .

Umitan go mki sku Taitung. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 892.99 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 817.5 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 74.18 km²), 4,278 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 1,090 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 4,032 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 94%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Bunun ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Umitan go ays psgayun 6 ru 15 alang. 15 alang hani ga, Kanahcian , Kanaluk , Bacingul , Kamcing , Kusunuki , Haitutuan , Takinusta , Sulai-iaz , Samuluh , Tuapuu , Takimi , Likau-uan , Bulbul , Vahu , Litu .
S.PHON: umitan ɣo mki s~ɕku taituŋ. s~ɕuʔunun kwara ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km* (rħjan rinpaŋ ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.* km*, rrʔan ħjan ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km*), *,*** ħi ku s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, *,*** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *,*** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na βunun ku s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu umitan ɣo ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun * ru ** alaŋ. ** alaŋ ħani ɣa, kanaħʦ~ʨian , kanaluk , βaʦ~ʨiŋul , kamʦ~ʨiŋ , kus~ɕunuki , ħaitutuan , takinus~ɕta , s~ɕulai-iaz , s~ɕamuluħ , tuapuu , takimi , likau-uan , βulβul , *aħu , litu .
